name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the user problem or pain point. (Not the proposed solution yet.)

## Proposed solution

How you'd like it to work. Mockups, sketches, or example flows welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't pick them.

## Additional context

Links, references, or examples from other projects. Anything else useful.
